CustomField.description: Controls whether Opportunity rollup totals are always attributed to the Primary Contact and their Household Account, even for organizational donations. When disabled (default), organizational Opportunities only credit the organization Account. Enabling this ensures the Primary Contact always receives donor statistics credit alongside the organization.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Always roll up donor statistics to the Primary Contact and their Household, even for organizational Opportunities. When unchecked, only the organization receives credit.
CustomField.label: Always Rollup to Primary Contact Role
